#  Manage Rows & Columns on the Subcontractor Invoices Tab 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
##  Background 
You can show, hide, group, sort, or size the columns in tables that appear in the Subcontractor Invoices and Disbursements tab of the Company level Payments tool, Depending on the tab you are using, you'll notice different table settings, options, and column configurations. However, the basic table functions operate similarly.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/permissions)
  * **Additional Information** :
    * To learn about the different tabs in the Payments tool, see [About the Company Payments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/about-the-payments-tool).


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Enable the Payments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-procore-pay)


##  Steps 
  * Manage Filters
  * Manage Table Settings
    * Configure Columns
  * Manage Columns
    * Adjust Column Width
    * Sort Columns
    * Group Columns
    * Column Grouping Options
    * Additional Grouping Options
  * Overflow Menu
    * Group by Project
    * Pin Column
    * Autosize this Column
    * Autosize All Columns
    * Reset Columns


### Manage Filters
To learn how to work with filters, see [Search for and Apply Filters on the Subcontractor Invoices Tab](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payments-admin-guide/apply-search-and-filter-options).
### Manage Table Settings
You can show/hide columns using the Table Settings options in the Payments tool. First, click the **Table Settings** ![Icon Ag Grid Table Filter Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1d97a42d56d2f59a975b527692307cc9/3c57ff1f9a947f923873f16d23351fed/icon-ag-grid-table-filter-menu.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon on the top-right side of the data table. This reveals the Table Settings pane on the right side of the web page. To close the pane, click the 'x' in the top-right corner.
![Ag Grid Open Table Settings](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/feea6722f30ef4b5229b56ae989bbd6a/67026a476cc635fa694db45d2763d665/ag-grid-open-table-settings.png?fm=webp)
#### Configure Columns
To choose the columns to show and hide, click the **Table Settings** ![Icon Ag Grid Table Filter Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1d97a42d56d2f59a975b527692307cc9/3c57ff1f9a947f923873f16d23351fed/icon-ag-grid-table-filter-menu.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon on the top-right side of the table. This reveals the Table Settings pane on the right side of the web page. Under the **Configure Columns** area, move the toggle to the right to turn the column display ON. Procore's default setting is to show all available columns. To learn about the available columns in each tab, see [About the Company Payments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/about-the-payments-tool).
![Ag Grid Toggle Table Columns](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ec947ef4c6b9143bbc8dcacb0dadc18c/53c282ebd045425ade08ed408736ec64/ag-grid-toggle-table-columns.png?fm=webp)
Other options in the Table Settings area include:
  * To hide a specific column, move the toggle to the left.
  * To show a specific column, move the toggle to the right.
  * To show all of the available columns, click the **Show All** link.
  * To close the panel, click the **Close** (x) icon.


### Manage Columns
#### Adjust Column Width
To adjust the width of a single column, hover your cursor over the right border of a column heading until the resize handle ![Icon Ag Grid Table Column Resize](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/02589e51ce0ff9cb331fde3feadf85e9/461a4df8be87c536ba8e4538eb133526/icon-ag-grid-table-column-resize.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon appears. Then drag the handle to the left or right to set the desired column width. If you press the SHIFT key while holding down the resize handle, a blue outline appears over the active column to help you see your column adjustment.
![Ag Grid Resize Table Columns](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/401f33d5f48a0b988177a0d245afbe36/967792663f1c906f8caacb5e652e5a79/ag-grid-resize-table-columns.png?fm=webp)
#### Sort Columns
To sort the table's data by a specific column, click any column heading to reveal a BLUE arrow to adjust the sort order of the contracts table.
![Ag Grid Sort Table Columns](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/dc419d076346181243b0fbb45225fb0f/1dab284d8f41b228321cb982ea837206/ag-grid-sort-table-columns.png?fm=webp)  
| ![Icon Ag Grid Sort Ascending](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1630d030d8e366336a40551664a8caf4/3f948b551a1787f9cb155594249121ae/icon-ag-grid-sort-ascending.png?fm=webp&h=14)  | Ascending  |  To reset your columns, hover your cursor over the right side of a column heading until the vertical ellipsis  ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) appears. Then choose **Reset Columns** from the drop-down menu.  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| ![Icon Ag Grid Sort Descending](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/94ae05ceca562073aac3e7f21b90671b/adc961d5f4d0390bd53a0594f6c1ec90/icon-ag-grid-sort-descending.png?fm=webp&h=14)  | Descending  |   |  
#### Group Columns
Some columns let you group your table's data. Columns that can be grouped contain a grouping option in the Overflow Menu.
##### Column Grouping Options
The options in the **Select a Column to Group** drop-down list lets you apply these grouping options to your table.  
| **Invoice Status**  | Groups invoices by the available statuses  | To learn about the available statuses, see [What are the default statuses for Procore invoices?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-default-statuses-for-procore-invoices)  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| **Company**  | Groups invoices by company  | This option corresponds to the 'Contract Company' set on the commitment's associated with your company's invoices.   |  
| **Project**  | Groups invoices by project  | This option corresponds to the 'Name' field under 'Project Information' in the General tab of the Project Settings in each project's Admin tool. See [Change the Name of a Procore Project](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-project/tutorials/change-the-name-of-a-procore-project).  |  
| **Billing Period**  | Groups invoices by billing period  | This option corresponds to the billing periods in your company's Procore projects. Billing periods are created in the Project level Invoicing tool. See [Manage Billing Periods](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/manage-billing-periods).  |  
| **Contract**  | Groups invoices by each commitment contract  | This option corresponds to the purchase orders and subcontracts created in the Project level Commitments tool.   |  
##### Additional Grouping Options
After you apply your grouping options, a drop-down menu appears above the table. This menu lets you add, remove, arrange, and reset your table's groupings.
  * To change the row group order, grab a group label by its **Reorder Grip** ![Icon Reorder Grip](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1dd0b6158ae899c165fa049f87185745/e6cd55122208aa3c2cb2559eb34ae69d/icon-reorder-grip.png?fm=webp&h=14) and drag it into the desired position.  
![Ag Grid Reorder Table Grouping Filters](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a48d7336c69e8f0e857396bdc299baf5/9d8b051ea0e6163880b90909b3bcbe59/ag-grid-reorder-table-grouping-filters.png?fm=webp)
  * To remove a single option, click the 'x' next to the option to remove.  
![Ag Grid Remove Table Grouping Filter](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb9cac23768d37153fd4a43f5d64352b/8e2c838d690afc0553ecb18509b3191e/ag-grid-remove-table-grouping-filter.png?fm=webp)
  * To apply an available grouping option, click an option highlighted in GRAY.  
![Ag Grid Apply Table Grouping Filter](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b4df62dc1405e56789798b93b381deb6/aeb9959f332585507082a36c80997db5/ag-grid-apply-table-grouping-filter.png?fm=webp)
  * To restore the default settings, click **Reset** in the drop-down menu.  
![Ag Grid Reset Table Grouping Filters](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/ed7ff3b374ff044f7557f777bfb1e410/08bf6a0ebf4348127aeaea80124c871f/ag-grid-reset-table-grouping-filters.png?fm=webp)


### Overflow Menu
To open a drop-down menu with additional column options, click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) to reveal an Overflow menu with the options detailed below.
![Ag Grid View More Table Options](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/3a1f4a65feaeb2109194f5fc7dc6e5d4/5f2cde417b9bafe33d32570fc9feffbf/ag-grid-view-more-table-options.png?fm=webp)
The Overflow menu includes these options:
  * Group by Project
  * Pin Column
  * Autosize this Column
  * Autosize All Columns
  * Sort By This Column
  * Reset Columns


#### Group by Project
To keep data columns in the table organized by Procore project, select the **Group by Project** option
#### Pin Column
To keep data columns in the table from moving when you scroll, you can pin a column to freeze it in place. To do this, hover your cursor over the right side of a column heading unit the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) appears. Next, click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) and choose **Pin Column**. Then choose one of these options:
  * To pin a column on the left side of the table, choose **Pin Left**.
  * To pin a column on the left side of the table, choose **Pin Right**. 
#####  Tip
    * Procore pins columns to the left or right side of the page in the order columns are pinned.
    * You can rearrange your pinned columns by dragging and dropping a column into the desired position.
    * You can pin columns to both the left and right side of the table.
  * To remove all pins, choose **No Pin**.


#### Autosize this Column
To automatically set the width of a column to match its contents, click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) and select the **Autosize This Column** option from the drop-down menu.
#### Autosize All Columns
To automatically set the width of all columns in the table to best match the contents, click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) and select the **Autosize All Columns** option from the drop-down menu.
#### Sort By This Column
To automatically set the sort order of the column, click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) and select **Sort By This Column**. Then choose one of these options:
  * To sort the table by the selected column listing entries in ascending order, choose **Sort Column Ascending**.
  * To sort the table by the selected column and list entries in descending order, choose **Sort Column Descending**.
  * To remove the ascending/descending sort order, choose **Column Not Sorted**.


#### Reset Columns
To reset the table's columns to Procore's default settings, hover your cursor over the right side of a column heading until the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) appears. Then click the vertical ellipsis ![Icon Ellipsis Options Menu](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a96b8bda355760bcced149918284c761/d8f6ecf936a0d4af3a99066b425cadd2/icon-ellipsis-options-menu.png?fm=webp&h=16) and select the **Reset Columns** option from the drop-down menu. This resets all of your column settings to the default settings.
## See Also
  * [About the Subcontractor Invoices Tab in the Payments Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/about-the-subcontractor-invoices-tab-in-the-payments-tool)
  * [Enable & Configure Procore Pay Invoice Signing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/enable-and-configure-procore-pay-invoice-signing)
  * [Enable or Disable Procore Pay on Your Projects](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/enable-or-disable-procore-pay-on-your-projects)
title: Manage Rows & Columns on the Subcontractor Invoices Tab
description: How to manage the rows and columns in the Company level Payments tool.
